data.title: Hackers panic-sold 7,816 ETH again, with cumulative losses exceeding $13.4 million
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, six wallets associated with the hacker panic-sold 7,816 ETH (worth approximately $29.14 million) at an average price of $3,728 during the market downturn, resulting in a further loss of approximately $3.37 million. Statistics show that these addresses have recently incurred cumulative losses exceeding $13.4 million due to buying high and selling low. Previously, during the previous market crash, the hacker also sold 8,638 ETH at an average price of $3,764, resulting in a loss of approximately $5.5 million.

data.title: Tether Gold's market capitalization exceeds $2 billion, hitting a record high
data.description: Coingecko data shows that the market capitalization of Tether's gold-backed stablecoin, Tether Gold (XAUT), has surpassed $2 billion, reaching $2,219,853,037, a new all-time high, with a circulating supply of 522,089 coins. Furthermore, the total market capitalization of the tokenized gold sector has surpassed $3.95 billion, reaching $3,950,937,387, also a new high, with a 24-hour increase of 15.4%.

data.title: "Big Brother Maji" adds another ETH long position and adds 220,000 USDC to Hyperliquid
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Huang Licheng, known as "Big Brother," received 220,000 USDC from QCP Capital and transferred it to the Hyperliquid platform, where he continued to increase his long ETH position. His current position is approximately 1,439 ETH, valued at approximately $5.5 million, with a liquidation price of $3,734. He has previously experienced multiple margin calls during market fluctuations.

data.title: Dogecoin (DOGE) Falls 10% to $0.17 as Whales Dump $74M Despite Nasdaq Merger Hype
data.description:
In the past 24 hours, Dogecoin (DOGE)’s price slipped another 10% to $0. 17, extending a weekly drop of more than 27% as on-chain data showed whales unloading roughly 360 million DOGE ($74 million). Related Reading: Why The Dogecoin Price Could Still Hit A 600% Rally To Send It Above $1. 5 The selloff arrived despite upbeat headlines around House of Doge’s plan to merge with a Nasdaq-listed company and Thumzup’s exploration of DOGE payouts for creators
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-doge-falls-10-to-0-17-as-whales-dump-74m-despite-nasdaq-merger-hype/

data.title: Smart money Hanmancheol's real-time short position on COAI went bankrupt, resulting in a loss of over $1.37 million in three days.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Binance's real-time smart money account, Hanmancheol, continuously shorted the COAI token over three consecutive days, paying a total of $774,000 in funding fees, with an average entry price of $10.79 and an average liquidation price of $18.97, resulting in a loss of $1.378 million. The account had previously made profits on six futures contracts this month, but this still failed to offset the losses from the liquidation.

data.title: A suspected Blockchain Capital address deposited 28 million SKY tokens to CEXs such as Binance.
data.description: According to Arkham monitoring, about 35 minutes ago, an address marked as suspected Blockchain Capital deposited a total of 28 million SKY to three exchanges: Binance, OKX, and Bybit. Among them, 20 million SKY (worth $1.18 million) was transferred to Binance, 4 million SKY (worth $236,060) was transferred to OKX, and 4 million SKY (worth $236,060) was transferred to Bybit.

data.title: Hackers Incur Losses Amid Ethereum Market Downturn
data.description: According to PANews, several hackers have reportedly sold off 7,816 ETH, valued at $29.14 million, during a market decline, resulting in a loss of $3.37 million. The sale occurred at a price of $3,728 per ETH. Recently, six hacker wallets have collectively lost over $13.4 million due to buying high and selling low in the Ethereum market.

data.title: Crypto stocks closed mixed at the close of the US stock market, with COIN up 1.75%
data.description: According to data from msx.com, US stocks closed up 0.52% on Friday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average, the S&P 500 up 0.53%, and the Nasdaq up 0.52%. Crypto stocks showed mixed performance, with Coinbase (COIN) leading the gains with a 1.75% increase, Strategy (MSTR) up 2.12%, and BTCS (BTCS) up 3.34%. New SOL treasury stock Helius (HSDT) saw the largest declines, falling 23.24%, while ALT5 Sigma (ALTS) fell 11.19%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: The Crypto Fear Index is currently at 23, which is in the extreme panic range.
data.description: According to Alternative data, the Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index is currently at 23 (from 22 yesterday), indicating that market sentiment remains extremely fearful. Note: The Fear Index threshold is 0-100 and includes the following indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media interest (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's share of the overall market (10%) + Google search terms analysis (10%).

data.title: Evolving Frames
data.description:
"Evolving Frames" refers to the dynamic and transformative perspectives through which we interpret and understand various aspects of life, society, and the world around us. As our experiences and knowledge grow, so do the frames we use to view our relationships, cultural norms, and personal beliefs, allowing us to adapt and respond to changing circumstances and new information. Through this evolution, we are better equipped to navigate complexities and embrace diverse viewpoints, ultimately fostering personal growth and deeper connections with others.
source: https://magazine.shib.io/

data.title: Solana Proposal Enhances Block Production Efficiency
data.description: According to Foresight News, Solana's improvement proposal SIMD-0337 introduces a block tagging feature to implement a rapid leader transition mechanism in Alpenglow. This technology allows leaders to begin block production based on the expected parent block without waiting for confirmation, reducing block production time by approximately 120 milliseconds and improving inter-block reliable latency (IBRL) by about 7.5%. The new mechanism is achieved through two tags, BlockHeader and UpdateParent, ensuring security against malicious actions while maximizing network throughput. Detailed technical information has been published on GitHub.

data.title: Bloomberg: Bank of England plans to implement stablecoin regulations by the end of 2026
data.description: The Bank of England will launch a consultation on stablecoin regulation on November 10, aiming to establish a comprehensive regulatory framework by the end of 2026. The new rules will closely align with US regulations, focusing on bonds backed by digital assets. This move aims to address the financial stability risks posed by the proliferation of digital currencies. US regulations require that the backing assets must be government debt with an issuance term of three months or less, or bonds with a remaining term of three months or less. Sources added that the Bank of England also plans to allow a wide range of assets backing stablecoins to earn interest to attract issuers. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Bitcoin Bulls Rely on STH Realized Price Support Cluster: Loss Could Trigger $100K Retest
data.description:
Bitcoin is once again under heavy pressure, sliding toward the $103,000 level as the broader crypto market undergoes a sharp downturn. After days of volatility and failed recovery attempts, BTC has lost key support, triggering renewed fear and accelerating sell-offs across altcoins. Most major assets are showing deep losses, with traders and investors now questioning whether the market has entered a deeper corrective phase. Related Reading: Paxos Mints 300 Trillion PYUSD By Error – Here’s What Happened According to top analyst Axel Adler, Bitcoin’s main support zone lies between $106,000 and $107,000, a range defined by the Short-Term Holder (STH) 1M–3M Realized Price and the 200-day simple moving average (SMA 200D)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-bulls-rely-on-sth-realized-price-support-cluster-loss-could-trigger-100k-retest/
